title: Aaj Jaane Ki Zid Na Karo
stanzas: aaj jaane kii zid na karo
yuu.N hii pahaluu me.n baiThe raho
haaye mar jaaye.nge, ham to luT jaaye.nge
aisii baate.n kiyaa na karo
tum hii socho zaraa kyuu.N na roke tumhe.n
jaan jaatii hai jab uThke jaate ho tum
tum ko apnii qasam jaan-e-jaa.N
baat itnii merii maan lo
vaqt kii qaid me.n zindagii hai magar
chand gha.Diyaa.N yahii hai.n jo aazaad hai
in ko kho kar merii jaan-e-jaa.N
umr bhar na taraste raho
kitanaa maasuum-o-rangiin hai ye samaa
husn aur ishq kii aaj meiraaj hai
kal ki kis ko Khabar jaan-e-jaa.N
rok lo aaj kii raat ko

title: Aaj Sochaa to Aansoo Bhar Aaye
stanzas: aaj sochaa to aansoo bhar aaye
muddate ho gayee muskuraae
har kadam par udhar mud ke dekha
unki mehfil se hum uth to aaye
reh gayi zindagi dard banke
dard dil me chhupaye chhupaye
dil ki naazuk rage.n tootati hai
yaad itna bhi koi na aaye

title: Aap ko bhool jaayen hum
stanzas: aap ko bhool jaayen hum, itne to bewafa nahin
aapse kya gila karen, Aapse kuch gila nahin
hum to samjh rahe the yeh, tum mile pyaar mel gaya
ek tere dard ke siva, hum ko to kuch mila nahin
shisha-e-dil ko todna, unka to ek khel hai
humhi se bhool ho gayee, unke koi khata nahin
kaash wo apne gham mujhe de de to kuch sukoon mile
wo kitna bad-naseeb hai, gham hee jise mila nahin
jurm hai gar wafa to kya, kyun mein wafa ko chhod dun
kehte hain is gunaah ki, hoti koi saza nahin

title: Agar Mujhse Mohabbat Hai
stanzas: agar mujh se mohabbat hai
mujhe sab apne gham de do
in aankho ka har ik aansu
mujhe meri kasam de do
tumhare gham ko apna
gham banaa lu to karar aaye
tumharaa dard seene mein
chhupa lu to karar aaye
woh har shay jo tumhen dukh de
mujhe mere sanam de do
in aankho mein ab
kabhi aansoo nazar aaye
sada hasti rahen aankhe
sada ye honth muskaaye
mujhe apni sabhi aahen
sabhi dardo aalam de do

title: Apni Aankhon Ke Samundar Mein
stanzas: apni aankhon ke samundar mein utar jaane de
tera mujrim hun mujhe Dub ke mar jaane de
ai naye dost main samjhunga tujhe bhi apna
pahle mazi ka koi zaKHm to bhar jaane de
zaKHm kitne teri chahat se mile hain mujh ko
sochta hun ki kahun tujh se magar jaane de
aag duniya ki lagai hui bujh jaegi
koi aansu mere daman pe bikhar jaane de
sath chalna hai to phir chhoD de sari duniya
chal na pae to mujhe lauT ke ghar jaane de
zindagi main ne ise kaise piroya tha na soch
haar TuTa hai to moti bhi bikhar jaane de
in andheron se hi suraj kabhi niklega 'nazir'
raat ke saaye zara aur nikhar jaane de

title: Baat Niklegi To Phir
stanzas: baat niklegi to fir duur talak jaayegi
log bevajha udasi ka sabab puchhenge
yae bhi puchhenge ke tum itni pareshhan kyun ho
ungliyaan uthegi sukhe huae baalon ki taraf
ek nazar dekhenge guzre huae saalon ki taraf
choodiyon par bhi kai tanz kiye jaayenge
kaampte haathhon pe bhi fikr-e-kas-e-jaayenge
log zaalim hai har ik baat ka taana denge
baaton baaton mei mera zikr bhi le aayenge
unki baaton ka zara sa bhi asar mat lena
varna chahere ke taasur se samaj jaayenge
chahe kuchh bhi ho sawaalaat na karna unse
mere baare mei koi baat na karna unse
baat niklegi to duur talak jaayegi

title: Humko Kiske Gham Nay Maara
stanzas: dil ki choton ne kabhi chain se rehne na diya
jab chali sard hawa maine tujhe yaad kiya
iska rona nahi kyun tumne kiya dil barbaad
iska gham hai ke bahut dair mein barbaad kiya
humko kiske gham ne maara, yeh kahaani phir sahi
kisne tora dil hamara, yeh kahaani phir sahi
dil kay lutnay ka sabab, poocho na sabke saamnay
naam aayega tumhara, yeh kahaani phir sahi
nafraton ke teer kha kar, doston ke shehar mein
humne kis kis ko pukara, yeh kahaani phir sahi
kya batayein pyaar ki, baazi wafa ki rah mein,
kaun jeeta kaun haara, yeh kahaani phir sahi

title: Hungama Hai Kyun Barpa
stanzas: hungama hai kyuu.N barpaa, tho.Dii si jo pi li hai
Daakaa to nahii.n Daalaa chorii to nahii.n ki hai
naa-Tajrubaa kaarii se, vaaiz ki ye baate.n hai.n
is rang ko kya jaane, puuchho to kabhi pi hai
us mai se nahii.n matalab, dil jis se ho begaanaa
maqsuud hai us mai se, dil hii me.n jo khi.chktii hai
har zarraa chamakataa hai anvaar-e-ilaahii se
har saa.Ns ye kahatii hai ham hai.n to Khudaa bhii hai
suuraj me.n lage dhabbaa fitarat ke karishme hai.n
buth ham ko kahe kaafir, allaah kii marzii hai

title: Mere Ham-nafas Mere Ham-navaa
stanzas: mere ham-nafas, mere ham-navaa
mujhe dost banake daGaa na de
mai.n huu.N dard-e-ishq se jaa.N valab
mujhe zindagi ki duaa na de
mere daaG-e-dil se hai raushnii,
usi raushni se hai zindagi
mujhe Dar hai aye mere chaaraagar,
ye charaag tu hi bujhaa na de
mujhe chho.D de mere haal par,
teraa kyaa bharosaa hai chaaraagar
ye terii nawaazish-e-muKhtasar,
meraa dard aur ba.Daa na de
mera azm itnaa bala.nd hai
ke paraaye sholo.n kaa Dar nahii.n
mujhe Khauf aatish-e-gul se hai,
ye kahii.n chaman ko jalaa na de

title: Pyaar Bhare Do Sharmile Nain
stanzas: pyaar bhare do sharmile nain
jinse mila mere dil ko chain
koyi jaane na kyun mujhse sharmaaye
kaise mujhe tadpaaye
dil ye kahe geet main tere gaaoon
tu hi sunein  aur main gaata jaaoon
tu jo rahe saath mere
duniya ko thukraaoon
tera dil behlaoon
roop tera kaliyon ko sharmaaye
kaise koyi apne dil ko bachaye
paas hai tu phir bhi jaloo'n
kaun tujhe saamjhaaye
saawan beeta jaaye
darr hai mujhe tujhse bichhad na jaaoon
kho ke tujhe milne ki raah na paaoon
aisa na ho jab bhi tera
naam laabo'n par laau'n
main aansoon ban jaaoon

title: Pyaar ka Pehla Khat Likhne Mein
stanzas: pyaar ka pehla khat likhne mein, waqt to lagta hai
naye parindo ko udne mein, waqt to lagta hai
jism ki baat nahi thi, unke dil tak jaana tha
lambi doori, tay karne mein, waqt to lagta hai
gaanth agar lag jaye to phir, rishte ho ya dori
laakh kare koshish, khulne me, waqt to lagta hai
humne ilaaj-e-zaKHm-e-dil to, dhoond liya lekin
gahray zakhmo ko bharne mein, waqt to lagta hai

title: Rafta Rafta Woh Meri
stanzas: rafta rafta wo meri hasti ka saamaaN ho gaye
pehle jaaN fir jaan-e-jaaN fir jaan-e-jaanan ho gaye
din-ba-din badhti gayi is huSn ki raanayeeyaaN
phele gul fir gul badan fir gul badaama ho gaye
aap to nazdeeK se nazdeek tar aate gaye
pehle dil fir dilruba fir dil ke mehmaaN ho gaye
pyaar jab had se baDha saare takalluf mit gaye
aap se fir tum huye fir tu ka unwaaN ho gaye

title: Ranjish hi Sahi
stanzas: ranjish hi sahi dil hi dukhane ke liye aa
aa phir se mujhe chho.D ke jaane ke liye aa
kis kis ko bata.enge juda.i ka sabab ham
tu mujh se ḳhafa hai to zamane ke liye aa
maana ki mohabbat ka chupaana hai mohabbat
chupke se kisi roz jataane ke liye aa
jaise tujhe aate hain na aane ke bahaane
aise hi kisi roz na jaane ke liye aa
kuchh to mire pindar-e-mohabbat ka bharam rakh
tu bhi to kabhi mujh ko manane ke liye aa
pahle se marasim na sahi phir bhi kabhi to
rasm-o-rah-e-duniya hi nibhane ke liye aa
ab tak dil-e-ḳhush-fahm ko tujh se hain umiden
ye aḳhiri sham'en bhi bujhane ke liye aa

title: Roshan Jamaal-e-Yaar
stanzas: raushan jamaal-e-yaar se hai, anjuman tamaam
dahakaa huaa hai aatish-e-gul se, chaman tamaam
allaah re jism-e-yaar kii Khuubii ke Khud-ba-Khud
ra.ngiiniyo.n me.n Duub gayaa pairaahan tamaam
dekho to chashm-e-yaar kii jaaduu nigaahiyaa.N
behosh ik nazar me.n hu_ii anjuman tamaam
hairat Guruur-e-husn se shoKhii se iztaraab
dil ne bhii tere siikh liye hai.n chalan tamaam

title: Saadgi toh Hamari Zara Dekhiye
stanzas: saadgi to hamari zara dekhiye,
aitibaar aap ke vaade par kar liya
baat to sirf ik raat ki thi magar,
intizar aap ka umr-bhar kar liya
ishq mein uljhanen pehle hi kam na thi
aur paida naya dard-e-sar kar liya
log Darte hain qatil ki parchha.in se,
ham ne qatil ke dil mein bhi ghar kar liya
zikr ik bewafa aur sitamgar ka tha,
aap ka aisi baton se kya vaasta
aap to bewafa aur sitamgar nahin,
aap ne kis liye munh udhar kar liya
zindagi ke safar men bahut duur tak,
jab koi dost aaya na ham ko nazar
ham ne ghabra ke tanha.iyon se 'saba'
ek dushman ko ḳhud ham-safar kar liya

title: Sarakti Jaaye Hai Rukh Se
stanzas: mazaar-e-Qais par, jab roohe Laila ek din ayee
toh armano ke, murjhaye hue kuch phool bhi layee
lagi jab phool rakhne, toh kabr se awaaz ye aaye
chadhana phool jane mann, magar, aahista aahista
saraktii jaaye hai ruKh se naqaab aahistaa aahistaa
nikaltaa aa rahaa hai aaftaab aahistaa aahistaa
jawaaN hone lage jab vo to ham se kar liyaa pardaa
hayaa yakalaKht aayii aur shabaab aahistaa aahistaa
shabefurkat kaa jaagaa huuN farishton ab to sone do
kabhii fursat men kar lenaa hisaab aahistaa aahistaa
savaale vasl par unako uduu kaa Khauf hai itnaa
dabe honThon se dete hain javaab aahistaa aahistaa
hamaare aur tumhaare pyar men bas fark hai itnaa
idhar to jaldii jaldii hai udhar aahistaa aahistaa
vo bedardii se sar kaaTe “Ameer” aur main kahuuN un se
huzuur aahistaa aahistaa, janaab aahistaa aahistaa

title: Tera Mera Hai Pyaar Amar
stanzas: jaan-e-tamanna, jaan-e-adaa tujhe, jaisa hai socha paaya wohi
sooraj ki kirnon sa ik chehra, dekha hai tumsa maine nahin
meri mohabbat ka har lamha, tujh mein hi gum sa gaya
na main hoon aashiq, na main deewaana, kehdo mujhe jo piya
tera mera hai pyaar amar, tu chaahe to qadmon mein sar rakh doon
ye jeewan kya, gar maange tu, meri jaan nazar kar doon
noor-e-jahaan aur noor-e-mohabbat, dono jude tujh se piya
paagal ya jogi mujhko kaho tum, haan mera ishq sab se juda
teri hi khaatir loon sau janam main, chaahe ho jo bhi bhala
na main hoon aashiq, na main deewaana, keh do mujhe jo piya
jab se mili tu dil ko yaqeen hai, tere liye hi main hoon bana
loota hai dil ko teri adaa ne, ye kaisa mujh pe jaadu kiya
meri dua mein, meri sadaa mein, hota hai naam tera
na main hoon aashiq, na main deewaana, keh do mujhe jo piya

title: Tere Aane ki Jab Khabar Mehke
stanzas: tere aane ki jab ḳhabar mehke
teri ḳhushbu se saara ghar mehke
shaam mehke tere tasavvur se
shaam ke ba.ad phir sahar mehke
raat bhar sochta raha tujh ko
zehn-o-dil mere raat bhar mehke
yaad aa.e to dil munavvar ho
diid ho jaa.e to nazar mehke
vo ghaḌi-do-ghaḌi jahan baiThe
vo zamin mehke vo shajar mehke

title: Tere Khushboo Mein Base Khat
stanzas: Tere Khushboo mein basey khat main jalata kaise
Pyar mein doobe hue khat main jalata kaise
Tere haaton ke likhe khat main jalata kaise
Jinko duniya ki nigahon se chupaye rakha
Jinko ek umr kalaje se lagaye rakha
Deen jinko jinhe imaan banaye rakha
Jinka har lafz mujhe yaad tha paani ki tarah
Yaad the mujhko jo paigam-e-zubani ki tarah
Mujhko pyaare the jo anmool nishani ki tarah
Tuune duniya ki nigahon se jo bachkar likhe
Saal-ha-saal mere naam barabar likhe
Kabhi din mein to kabhi raat ko uth kar likhe
Tere khushboo mein base khat main jalata kaise
Tere khat aaj main ganga mein baha aaya hun
Aag behte hue paani mein laga aaya hun

title: Tum Itna Jo Muskuraa Rahi Ho
stanzas: tum itnaa jo muskuraa rahe ho
kyaa Gham hai jisko chhupaa rahe ho
aa.Nkhon mein namii ha.Nsii labon par
kyaa haal hai kyaa dikhaa rahe ho
ban jaaye.nge zeher peete peete
ye ashq jo peete jaa rahe ho
jin zakhmo.N ko waqt bhar chalaa hai
tum kyo.N u.Nhe chhede jaa rahe ho
rekhaao.n kaa khel hai muqaddar
rekhaao.n se maat khaa rahe ho

title: Tum Mere Paas Nahi Ho
stanzas: tum mere paas nahi ho, mujhe iska gum hai
tum khayaalon mein jo aaye, yehi kya kam hai
meri tanhaiyon se tapka huwa aansu tum ho
pyaar ek phool hai, us phool ki khushboo tum ho
mera chehra meri aankhen mere ghesu tum ho
door ho mujhse magar, paas nazar aati ho
mera jazba mera ehsaas nazar aati ho
zindagi banke jo chhaya hai, wo jadu tum ho
jab bhi tanhaiyon mein aahat si koi pata hoon
ye samajh kar main hawaon se lipat jaata hoon
jaise mere liye khole huwe baazu tum ho

title: Woh Jo Ham Mein Tum Mein
stanzas: woh jo ham mein tum mein qaraar thaa
tumhe.n yaad ho ke na yaad ho
vahii yaanii vaadaa nibaah kaa
tumhe.n yaad ho ke na yaad ho
woh naye gile vo shikaayate.n
woh maze maze kii hikaayate.n
woh har ek baat pe ruuThanaa
tumhe.n yaad ho ke na yaad ho
kabhii ham mein tum mein bhii chaah thii
kabhii ham se tum se bhii raah thii
kabhii ham bhii tum bhii the aashnaa
tumhe.n yaad ho ke na yaad ho

title: Ye Dil ye Paagal Dil Mera (Aawaargi)
stanzas: ye dil, ye paagal dil meraa, kyo.n bujh gayaa, aawaargi
is dasht me.n ik shahar thaa, vo kyaa huaa, aawaargi
kal shab mujhe be-shakl sii, aavaaz ne chau.Nkaa diyaa
mai.ne kahaa tuu kaun hai, usane kahaa, aawaargi
ye dard kii tanahaaiyaa.N, ye dasht kaa viiraa.n safar
ham log to uktaa gaye apnii sunaa, aawaargi
ik ajanabii jho.nke ne jab, puuchhaa mere Gam kaa sabab
sahraa kii bhiigii ret par, mai.ne likhaa, aawaargi
ik tuu ki sadiyo.n se, mere ham-raah bhii ham-raaz bhii
ik mai.n ki tere naam se na-aashnaa, aawaargi
kal raat tanahaa chaa.Nd ko, dekhaa thaa mai.nne Kvaab me.n
'mohsin' mujhe raas aayegii shaayad sadaa, aawaargi

title: Zindagi Mein To Sabhi
stanzas: zindagi mein to sabhi pyaar kiya karte hain
main to markar bhi meri jaan tujhe chahoonga
tu mila hai to ye ehsaas huaa hai mujhko
ye meri umr mohabbat ke liye thhodi hai
ek zara sa ghum-e-dauraan ka bhi haq hai jis par
maine wo saans bhi tere liye rakh chhodi hai
tujh pe ho jaaoonga qurban tujhe chahoonga
main to markar bhi meri jaan tujhe chaahoonga
apne jazbaat mein naghmaat rachaane ke liye
maine dhadkan ki tarah dil mein basaaya hai tujhe
main tasavvur bhi judaai ka bhala kaise karoon?
maine kismat ki lakeeron se churaaya hai tujhe
pyar ka banke nigehbaan tujhe chaahoonga
main to markar bhi meri jaan tujhe chaahoonga
teri har chaap se jalte hain khayaalon mein chiraag
jab bhi tu aaye jagaata huaa jaadu aaye
tujhko chhulun to aye jaan-e-tamanna mujhko
dair tak apne badan se teri khushboo aaye
tu bahaaron ka hai unwaan tujhe chaahoonga
main to marrkar bhi meri jaan tujhe chaaoounga

title: Zindagi Se BaDi Sazaa Hi Nahin
stanzas: zindagii se ba.Dii sazaa hii nahii.n
aur kyaa jurm hai pataa hii nahii.n
itane hisso.n me.n baT gayaa huu.N mai.n
mere hisse me.n kuchh bachaa hii nahii.n
sach ghaTe yaa ba.De to sach na rahe
jhuuTh kii koii intehaa hii nahii.n
ja.D do chaa.Ndii me.n chaahe sone me.n
aaiinaa jhuuTh bolataa hii nahii.n
